description:
Markdown-based note-taking app for developers


🚀 Smarter AI, Better Organization & a More Polished Experience
Your notes just got a major upgrade.
AI is now deeply integrated across all editors — ask questions, automate tasks, and let the AI call your own custom functions to get real work done. 🤖
This release introduces a powerful agentic loop that turns your code snippets into live AI tools, opening the door to truly intelligent workflows right inside your notes. ⚡
On top of that, file organization is now more flexible than ever with improved virtual folder support, and a wave of UI refinements makes the whole experience feel cleaner and more intuitive — from the recipe browser to the function editor and environment settings. ✨
🔥 What's new
- 🤖 AI can now call your own functions to take action, not just generate text
- 📝 AI blocks are now available everywhere, across all editor types
- 🔗 Reference named blocks directly in your AI prompts
- 📂 Drag real folders into virtual folders for smarter organization
- 🖼️ Copy images to AI from your notes
- 🎨 Refreshed UI across dialogs, panels, and editors
